creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
> select: protocol failure in circuit setup
> cvs [checkout aborted]: end of file from server (consult above messages if any)
> *** Error code 1

I was getting the same errors, but with the recent changes to the port,
"make fetch" succeeds: 

>> Attempting to CVS checkout from anoncvs@anoncvs1.ca.openbsd.org:/cvs.
select: protocol failure in circuit setup
cvs [checkout aborted]: end of file from server (consult above messages if
any)
>> Attempting to CVS checkout from
:pserver:anoncvs@anoncvs1.usa.openbsd.org:/cvs.
cvs checkout: warning: unrecognized response `cvs: setgroups: Operation
not permitted' from cvs server
U src/usr.bin/ssh/COPYING.Ylonen
U src/usr.bin/ssh/Makefile
[...]

Maybe this PR can be closed.
__
Trevor Johnson
